name: qora-language
description: Syntax highlighting, hover docs, snippets, live parse errors, and OpenQASM transpile for the Qora quantum toy language.

qora.command.markdownDescription: Override the Qora parser CLI. **Leave empty to use the parser bundled with the extension** (a per-platform self-contained binary — no .NET install needed). Set this to a Qora executable, or to `dotnet` together with `#qora.args#` pointing at a `Qora.dll`. The extension appends `--json` and feeds the document on stdin.

qora.args.markdownDescription: Extra arguments before `--json`, used only when `#qora.command#` is set (or as a `dotnet` fallback when no bundled binary matches your platform). For example your built `Qora.dll` (`["C:/…/Qora/src/Qora/bin/Debug/net10.0/Qora.dll"]`), or `["run", "--project", "C:/…/Qora/src/Qora", "--"]` to run from source.
